series_metadata.series_description: Requisitions, mailing lists, specifications, copies of bid packages, copy of bid labels, all original bids, draft copies, bid tabulation, purchase order or blanket order. May include, if applicable, delivery requests, correspondence, catalogs/literature.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 8 years after end of applicable warranty period. Retain unsuccessful bids for 3 years after bid due date., Paper: Shred
